message:
fix(anthropic,openai,core): clippy pedantic lints + rustdoc Errors sections

Address clippy::missing_errors_doc, clippy::redundant_clone, and
clippy::single_char_pattern warnings across connector and core crates:

Anthropic/OpenAI connectors:
- Add `# Errors` rustdoc sections to all fallible public methods
  (new, message, chat, message_stream, handle_configure, handle_invoke,
  handle_health, handle_introspect, handle_simulate, handle_shutdown)
- Replace `.clone()` with copy semantics where types implement Copy
- Use `std::result::Result::ok` instead of closure in filter_map
- Collapse nested if-let into single pattern match for ContentBlockDelta
- Apply rustfmt line-length reformatting to assertions and builders

Core crates:
- lifecycle.rs: remove redundant .clone() on Copy types (HealthMetrics,
  LifecycleStatus)
- protocol.rs: remove redundant .clone() on Copy enums (UsageMetricKind,
  InvokeStatus, ResponseMeta), use char literal in contains(), replace
  [].into_iter().collect() with std::iter::once().collect()
- provenance.rs: replace collect::<Vec<_>>().len() with iter().count()

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
